synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-22361 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 qt6-qtquick3d security update
description:
[6.9.1-1.1]
- Fix CVE-2025-11277 in bundled assimp library
Resolves: RHEL-120981
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-22361

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-22361.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
qt6-qtquick3d-6.9.1-1.el10_1.1.x86_64.rpm
qt6-qtquick3d-devel-6.9.1-1.el10_1.1.x86_64.rpm
qt6-qtquick3d-examples-6.9.1-1.el10_1.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
qt6-qtquick3d-6.9.1-1.el10_1.1.aarch64.rpm
qt6-qtquick3d-devel-6.9.1-1.el10_1.1.aarch64.rpm
qt6-qtquick3d-examples-6.9.1-1.el10_1.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/qt6-qtquick3d-6.9.1-1.el10_1.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-11277




Description of changes:

[6.9.1-1.1]
- Fix CVE-2025-11277 in bundled assimp library
Resolves: RHEL-120981
